trigger: Top-of-hour non-Figma MVP builder run: add persisted teacher comments into the scoped review-history flow after immutable submission version snapshots landed.
scope: Persist review feedback into the existing comments table, support comment-only review records without status changes, and return scoped comments from the review-history endpoint alongside reviews, status history, and immutable version snapshots.
changes: Extended the review decision endpoint to accept `comment_only`, write a `reviews` row, write a student-and-staff-visible `comments` row, and leave submission/progress/status history unchanged for comment-only feedback.
Updated revision-request and approval decisions to also persist their feedback into the existing `comments` table and include comment IDs in audit metadata.
Updated the scoped review-history endpoint to return non-deleted submission comments with author names alongside reviews, status history, and immutable version snapshots.

Extended the review-loop integration test to prove student submit -> teacher comment -> teacher revision -> student resubmit -> teacher approval preserves comments, reviews, status history, and version snapshots.

post_push_smoke.production_health: 200 OK; environment=production; authMode=hardened_username_password; evidenceRootConfigured=true; googleDriveCredentialsConfigured=false; userCount=5

known_limits: The alpha/app review-history UI still needs to render the returned `comments` and `versions` arrays.

Remote D1 migration apply/verification remains blocked until `CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN` is available for prior `submission_versions` schema work; this run used the existing comments table and did not add a new migration.
next_actions: Wire the review-history UI to show returned comments and version snapshots without exposing Drive storage IDs.
Add review-history UI smoke coverage once the visible timeline is wired into the alpha/app surface.

automation_efficiency.scale_signal: accepted implementation pass; no cadence change recommended
